title: Pre-registered search strategy + screening protocol
context: To prevent cherry-picking, the corpus must be assembled from a documented, reproducible search registered before screening. This task writes the pre-registered search strategy and screening protocol across the open sources. Strictly aggregate, de-identified, open-access data only; no patient-level data; not medical advice.
objective: Document a pre-registered, reproducible search strategy and screening protocol with explicit inclusion/exclusion criteria across PMC-OA, ClinicalTrials.gov, SEER, and Cochrane.
acceptanceCriteria: Documented, reproducible queries for PMC-OA, ClinicalTrials.gov, SEER, and Cochrane.
Explicit inclusion/exclusion criteria (excludes case reports/series below the sample floor; aggregate-only).
Search protocol is pre-registered before screening to prevent cherry-picking.
output: /output/protocols/search-strategy.md plus a screening protocol, committed to the repo.
